title: Create container conmon rs
body:
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]". That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->
Currently the create functionality of the OCI Runtime Interface is
working at the bare minimum. It only works for rootful execution.

However, the currently lines that integrate Podman with Conmon-rs have
been commented out to prevent breaking main. Additionally, there is a
significant issue with CPU utilization that I need to figure out.

I also moved shared code between `libpod/oci_conmon_linux.go` and
`libpod/oci_conmon_rs_linux.go` into `libpod/conmon_utils.go`.

Additional Notes:
- Arguments need to get passed to either ConmonServerConfig or
  CreateContainerConfig. If an argument does nothing, it is indicative
  of functionality required on the conmon-rs side.
- There is currently no way to configure the environment of the
  conmon-rs process. This will need to be added on the conmon-rs side.
  Similar situation exists with storing extra files dealt with by the
  conmon-rs process.
- [This](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/b00e65aa9c071428579a55f91a92f3702765ed85/libpod/oci_conmon_linux.go#L1199-L1228) code is going to need some pretty significant adapting
- Need to wire
  [startCommand](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/b00e65aa9c071428579a55f91a92f3702765ed85/libpod/oci_conmon_linux.go#L1233)
  into conmon-rs as well.
- [readConmonPipeData](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/b00e65aa9c071428579a55f91a92f3702765ed85/libpod/oci_conmon_linux.go#L1250)
is going to have to be put in conmon-rs, most likely the
`ConmonServerConfig` struct.
- I speculate the CLI sets the old conmon path by default, and this is
  causing issues with finding the conmon-rs path.
- users will need to install conmon-rs using their `get` script to get
  the binary

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
None
```

@jakecorrenti how much bloat is this adding to the binary? i don't think CI is hitting that check yet due to the build failure. Not that we should worry too much because this is a necessary change... more just curious.

> @jakecorrenti how much bloat is this adding to the binary? i don't think CI is hitting that check yet due to the build failure. Not that we should worry too much because this is a necessary change... more just curious.

At this point I honestly do not know. I haven't had the chance to test out what I have (I'm assuming it does not work). I'm sure that there will need to be optimizations considering this is almost exactly the same as `libpod/oci_conmon_linux.go`. I can figure it out for you, though.
@cevich Can you take a look at these failing builds?

@jakecorrenti Did you update conmon-rs to the latest main and rebased podman to latets main? We move some code to c/common to remove the circular dependency, see https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/14804#discussion_r913147625

> @jakecorrenti Did you update conmon-rs to the latest main and rebased podman to latets main? We move some code to c/common to remove the circular dependency, see [#14804 (comment)](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/14804#discussion_r913147625)

I rebased the current branch with main, but I forgot to update the version of conmon-rs. Should fix that failing test now

@jakecorrenti: PR needs rebase.

<details>

Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
Ref: CI Update for conmon-rs is #15181
I can also take over some of the common rs integration, alot of the broken stuff has to do with rootless cgroup creation if I recall

Rootless is a bit broken, but the biggest issues remaining are in conmon-rs itself:

- Exec support
- Ability to pass FDs in
- Checkpoint and Restore
- File logging
I can take on some of those feature requests you mentioned previously that need work on the conmon-rs side as well.
File logging would be a good candidate. We're looking to produce logs formatted identically to the existing logs, which AFAIK is a fairly well-documented format - it's the Kubernetes standard
I'll start working on that end of the week / start of next (currently on vacation)

If you think it would help development, I could update #15181 so the status of all conmon-rs tasks is ignored (so everybody's PRs don't turn red).  This would have the side-effect of running our thousands of e2e and system tests with conmon-rs, by commenting out a one-line "ignore" instruction in the YAML.  LMK if you think that would help.  There's no way I'm going to fix #15181 on my own :grin:

> Rootless is a bit broken, but the biggest issues remaining are in conmon-rs itself

@mheon and @jakecorrenti FWIW, recent results from my conmon-rs PR (uses latest upstream `main` conmon-rs binary):

* [int podman fedora-36 root host-rs](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5359255183163392/html/int-podman-fedora-36-root-host-rs.log.html) -- 727 Passed | 976 Failed | 0 Flaked | 0 Pending | 79 Skipped
* [int podman fedora-36 rootless host-rs](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5499992671518720/html/int-podman-fedora-36-rootless-host-rs.log.html) -- 706 Passed | 901 Failed | 0 Flaked | 0 Pending | 175 Skipped
* [int remote fedora-36 root host-rs](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5781467648229376/html/int-remote-fedora-36-root-host-rs.log.html) -- 647 Passed | 903 Failed | 0 Flaked | 0 Pending | 218 Skipped
Fully expected, given the last of exec/checkpoint
